---
title: "Zhiyuan Zhou"
image: "Images/profileID.jpg"
about:
  template: trestles
  links:
    - text: GitHub
      icon: github
      url: "https://github.com/ZY-ZHOU23"
    - text: LinkedIn
      icon: linkedin
      url: "https://www.linkedin.com/in/zhiyuan-zhou-093972341"
    - text: Resume
      icon: file-earmark-person-fill
      url: "Documents/Resume.pdf"
comments: false
css: styles.css
---

:::: {.column-page}

## About Me

I recently graduated from UCLA with degrees in Economics and Statistics & Data Science, and I'm currently pursuing my Master of Public Policy at the University of Chicago.

My work mainly focuses on statistical modeling, data engineering, applied machine learning, and decision support systems. 


---

:::: {.columns}
:::: {.column width="50%"}

## Bonnie~

```{=html}
<div class="carousel-container">
  <div id="bonniephoto" class="carousel slide" data-bs-ride="carousel">
    <div class="carousel-inner">
      <div class="carousel-item active">
        <img class="d-block w-100" src="Images/hammy/h1.jpg" alt="Bonnie photo 1">
      </div>
      <div class="carousel-item">
        <img class="d-block w-100" src="Images/hammy/h2.jpg" alt="Bonnie photo 2">
      </div>
      <div class="carousel-item">
        <img class="d-block w-100" src="Images/hammy/h3.jpg" alt="Bonnie photo 3">
      </div>
      <div class="carousel-item">
        <img class="d-block w-100" src="Images/hammy/h4.jpg" alt="Bonnie photo 4">
      </div>
    </div>
    <button class="carousel-control-prev" type="button" data-bs-target="#bonniephoto" data-bs-slide="prev">
      <span class="carousel-control-prev-icon" aria-hidden="true"></span>
      <span class="visually-hidden">Previous</span>
    </button>
    <button class="carousel-control-next" type="button" data-bs-target="#bonniephoto" data-bs-slide="next">
      <span class="carousel-control-next-icon" aria-hidden="true"></span>
      <span class="visually-hidden">Next</span>
    </button>
  </div>
</div>
```

::::
:::: {.column width="50%"}

## MerMer~

```{=html}
<div class="carousel-container">
  <div id="mermerphoto" class="carousel slide" data-bs-ride="carousel">
    <div class="carousel-inner">
      <div class="carousel-item active">
        <img class="d-block w-100" src="Images/cat/window.jpg" alt="MerMer photo 1">
      </div>
      <div class="carousel-item">
        <img class="d-block w-100" src="Images/cat/plate.jpg" alt="MerMer photo 2">
      </div>
      <div class="carousel-item">
        <img class="d-block w-100" src="Images/cat/head.jpg" alt="MerMer photo 3">
      </div>
      <div class="carousel-item">
        <img class="d-block w-100" src="Images/cat/jump.jpg" alt="MerMer photo 4">
      </div>
      <div class="carousel-item">
        <img class="d-block w-100" src="Images/cat/catbox.jpg" alt="MerMer photo 5">
      </div>
      <div class="carousel-item">
        <img class="d-block w-100" src="Images/cat/inbag.jpg" alt="MerMer photo 6">
      </div>
      <div class="carousel-item">
        <img class="d-block w-100" src="Images/cat/loaf.jpg" alt="MerMer photo 7">
      </div>
      <div class="carousel-item">
        <img class="d-block w-100" src="Images/cat/car.jpg" alt="MerMer photo 8">
      </div>
    </div>
    <button class="carousel-control-prev" type="button" data-bs-target="#mermerphoto" data-bs-slide="prev">
      <span class="carousel-control-prev-icon" aria-hidden="true"></span>
      <span class="visually-hidden">Previous</span>
    </button>
    <button class="carousel-control-next" type="button" data-bs-target="#mermerphoto" data-bs-slide="next">
      <span class="carousel-control-next-icon" aria-hidden="true"></span>
      <span class="visually-hidden">Next</span>
    </button>
  </div>
</div>
```

::::
::::

::::
